## Code Review Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows established style guidelines
- [ ] Sufficient comments and documentation
- [ ] No commented-out code
- [ ] Proper error handling implemented

### Security
- [ ] Input validation implemented (Zod schemas)
- [ ] Rate limiting properly configured
- [ ] Authentication/authorization applied where needed
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Proper sanitization of user inputs

### Performance
- [ ] Efficient algorithms used
- [ ] Proper caching strategies implemented
- [ ] No performance bottlenecks introduced

### Compliance with Project Specifications
- [ ] Follows Zod validation patterns
- [ ] Implements proper rate limiting policies
- [ ] Adheres to architectural patterns
- [ ] Maintains existing functionality

### Automated Checks
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Linting passes
- [ ] Security scan passes

---

By submitting this pull request, I confirm that:
- The code follows project standards and best practices
- All automated checks have passed
- The changes have been properly tested
- Security implications have been considered
